response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo is a skilled and versatile hands-on engineer with roughly 17 years of experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated cloud strategy, and the capacity to advise strategic enterprise customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption. The candidate's trajectory is that of a senior/staff craftsman focused on software quality and delivery, with no evidence of strategic advisory work, enterprise-facing thought leadership, or published/recognized AI expertise. The gap between the candidate's current positioning and the seniority and specialization required by this role is substantial.
strengths: Recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates current engagement with agentic AI tooling
Founding and sustaining GISCollective alongside public conference talks and workshops shows entrepreneurial drive and community thought leadership
Exceptional technical breadth across embedded systems, high-performance services, web, and mobile over 15+ years
concerns: No demonstrated recognition as an AI expert — no AI products or platforms built at scale, no research output, and no advisory history with enterprise customers on AI strategy
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK in a narrow pricing-team context, well short of the strategic cloud platform expertise the role requires

No evidence of operating at director-level scope: influencing cross-organizational strategy, inspiring executive stakeholders, or driving external thought leadership at the scale this position demands

key_factors.factor: Absence of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
No strategic cloud or AI advisory experience with enterprise partners
Recent hands-on agentic AI and MCP tooling work
